dependencies: Certain third-party suppliers produce substantial portion of API and products
Highly exacting and complex manufacturing process required for some products
Single-sourced raw materials in certain cases
Significant API purchased from Matrix Pharma Private Limited under manufacturing and supply agreement following API business divestiture
risks: Concentration risk with limited manufacturing facilities
Third-party supplier failure to fulfill obligations
Supply chain disruptions from natural disasters, civil unrest, export/import restrictions
API supply shortages and price volatility
Equipment malfunction, failure to follow protocols, raw material problems
Cybersecurity or compliance issues at facilities

regulatory_risks: FDA and foreign regulatory authority compliance requirements
Warning letters and import alerts from FDA
Manufacturing facility inspections and potential shutdowns
Regulatory changes in pharmaceutical pricing and reimbursement
Environmental and occupational health and safety laws
Data privacy regulations (GDPR, HIPAA, China data security laws)
Anti-corruption laws (FCPA, UK Bribery Act, Chinese anti-corruption laws)
Trade controls and sanctions (OFAC, Iran sanctions)
Supply chain transparency and due diligence requirements
Pillar Two Global Anti-Base Erosion Rules (15% minimum tax)

sanction_risks: Iran Threat Reduction and Syria Human Rights Act compliance
Trade controls and sanctions related to Russia-Ukraine conflict
Potential reciprocal tariffs on products between US and other countries
Sanctions impacting ability to market or sell pharmaceuticals in certain countries
